items.author: ghikjkho

items.title: A Wonderful Game
items.summary: I started playing the game around the second anniversary, and I can’t recommend it enough. The story is engaging, and doesn’t feel stale, the gacha is very fair and being able to get a free duplicate of a character a month helps make the experience less stressful. I also appreciate how the dailies and weeklies aren’t too time consuming, it makes this game feel like a game instead of a job or chore. The combat is pretty tough but rewarding, and I’ve never felt like I “needed” a character to get through a problem.
items.author: J.Pal2004
